title: Loop closure foundation
objective: Define command contracts and implementation boundaries for v47 loop-closure commands.
description: Prepares v47 without runtime implementation and records overlap with v46 compatibility work.
parallel_safe_reason: Foundation clarifies contracts for all v47 command additions.
must: Document exact command contracts for status, evidence list/show, changelog, demo spec-viewer, and config decision.
Record dependencies on v46 deprecation conventions.
acceptance: Implementation is deferred to later slices.
validation_hints: Keep status read-only and evidence show path-safe.
